title: Christmas Pack 2025
description: This modpak is filled with warmth, cosiness and festive magic.
body:
![View in Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3f16a7ce4414e9076a15fdf431a9ba8b4a0c5f9.png)рҹҺ„Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of this Christmas and New Year!рҹҺҒ
рҹҺ…рҹҸ»This modpak is filled with warmth, cosiness and festive magic.рҹҺ…рҹҸ»
рҹҺ„Decorate your home with wreaths and trees and have a winter adventure with friends!рҹҺ„


What awaits you:

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вқ„пёҸSnowy landscapes and soft winter lightвқ„пёҸ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹҘӮрҹҢҹNew YearвҖҷs decorations, gifts and festive itemsрҹҘӮрҹҢҹ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹ§ЈAtmospheric music and cozy vibeрҹ§Ј

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

рҹҰҢрҹӣ·Many fashions, creating a real holiday feeling!рҹҰҢрҹӣ·

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вҳғпёҸTurn on the moodpak, light up the garlands and feel the Christmas miracle come to life right in Minecraft!вҳғпёҸ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

This modpack is made from other mods not related to me! But without them there would be no modpack!
